description: Organization chat for shared signals, team-wide decisions, and cross-project coordination.

messages.author: Rhea S.
messages.body: Morning sync stays async today. Post blockers here before 11:30.

messages.author: Miles K.
messages.body: Auth fix is ready for review. QA can start after the staging deploy lands.

messages.author: Ari V.
messages.body: Need confirmation on websocket reconnect behavior before I merge the next pass.

messages.author: Jules N.
messages.body: Acme wants a tighter summary on launch risks. Keep anything client-safe in this thread.

messages.author: Devora Ops
messages.body: Production notifications are stable. Browser and email delivery are both active.
